name: claude-nomad
description: Claude Code companion plugin for claude-nomad: sync ~/.claude/ across machines with pull/push/doctor/diff/clean commands and a SessionStart drift-warning hook.

plugins.name: nomad
plugins.description: Companion plugin for the claude-nomad CLI. Adds /nomad:pull, /nomad:push, /nomad:doctor, /nomad:diff, and /nomad:clean slash commands plus a session-start drift-warning hook, so you can sync ~/.claude/ across machines without leaving Claude Code. Requires the standalone claude-nomad npm CLI.
